# Reading depth policy

Escalate reading depth only when needed.

## Levels

- `metadata`: title, venue, date, source page context
- `abstract`: abstract-level fit and claims
- `html`: full HTML page read
- `pdf`: full PDF inspection

## Escalation guidance

- Stay at `metadata`/`abstract` for obvious rejects.
- Move to `html` for shortlist candidates when abstracts are thin.
- Move to `pdf` for top candidates or when claims need verification.
- Deep-read set is capped at 3 and should focus on highest expected transfer value.
